request.message: I transferred $500 to my friend 3 days ago but the money has not arrived yet. The transfer ID is TXN-88234.
My account has been blocked after I tried to make a large transfer. I urgently need access restored.
I see an unauthorized charge of $1,200 on my account that I did not make. This looks like fraud. Please help immediately!
I returned a product to an online store two weeks ago and they said the refund was processed, but I still haven't received the money in my account.
I requested a new credit card 15 days ago but it has not arrived yet. My old card has expired and I cannot make payments.
I lost my debit card at the shopping mall. I need to block it immediately before someone uses it.
I am unable to log into my internet banking account. It says my credentials are incorrect but I am sure I am using the right password.
I forgot my banking app password and the reset link sent to my email is not working. Can you help me reset it?
What is my current available balance? I see my balance in the app but there is a pending amount I do not understand.
I am interested in applying for a personal loan of $10,000. What are the current interest rates and what documents do I need to provide?
I think my account has been hacked. There are multiple transactions I did not authorise and my password was changed without my knowledge.
What are your branch opening hours and is there a branch near the city centre?
